subject: Re: Quick thought on your AI eval setup
body: Hey Saurabh, this actually landed at the right time. We're literally evaluating Claude vs in-house this quarter. Can you send a 1-pager on how you'd approach the eval layer? Open to a call next week if it makes sense.

subject: Re: Your Series B and what comes next
body: Please remove me from this list. I do not want to receive these emails anymore.

subject: Out of office: Re: Your new RevOps lead
body: I am out of the office until June 30th with limited email access. For urgent matters please contact my colleague at colleague@enterprise-saas.com. I will respond to your email upon my return.

subject: Re: Outreach about marketing automation
body: Thanks for reaching out but we already use HubSpot + Salesforce extensively and have a 4-person ops team. Not really in the market for an agency right now. Maybe revisit in 6 months.

subject: Re: Curious about your last LinkedIn post
body: I'm no longer with this company. You can reach the new head of growth at h.growth@growth-fintech.com. Please update your records.

subject: Re: Your signal monitoring approach
body: interesting. how does this work with billing systems and outage events? we have a lot of legacy data. would want to see how you handle PII before any deeper conversation.
